rationale: The synthetic ensures is `BIG_CONJ ==> det_equal`, so the original function's ensures aren't free hypotheses in the proof body — that is why the previous attempt's `assert(post.get_X(k) =~= pre.get_X(k))` inside `assert forall ... by { ... }` failed. Wrapping in `if BIG_CONJ { ... }` materializes every ensures-conjunct as a hypothesis, lets each single-state trigger fire, and we then lift the per-key value equality through `wf()` (broadcast-revealed `is_init`/`addr`) to full map extensional equality on each `*_perms@`.
